description: You are a facility planner transforming a building shell into a high-security Rare Books and Special Collections Archive. Divide the space into four distinct zones: a Secure Vault, a Reading Room, a Conservation Lab, and a Reception area. Your layout must include at least 4 partition walls to separate these zones and at least 3 doors for access control. Define at least 4 rooms, applying a distinct floor color or texture to at least 2 of them. Furnish the Archive with at least 12 high-density storage items (bookcases, shelves, or cabinets) in the Vault, at least 7 desks/tables and 10 chairs across the Reading Room and staff areas, and at least 1 sink in the Conservation Lab. Document aisle widths in the Vault for ADA compliance using at least 2 dimension lines. The completed layout must contain at least 45 total furniture items. Save your work.
